data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit 50e999521e9b and impl commit 07a6d6a1f190 are on main. (2) 4 files changed as planned: repo-switcher.tsx bootstrap guard prevents re-overriding all-repos selection, app-header.tsx Shift+N routes through repo chooser in all-repos mode, button relabeled to Add, plus 2 contract tests. (3) No invariants defined; scope matches plan. (4) tsc clean, lint clean on changed files (pre-existing errors elsewhere), build succeeds, all 4 new contract tests pass. (5) No regressions in dependent systems.
